prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 26C-BLE-RIBBEDGLASSJARS-PARENT Product Type: FOOD_STORAGE_CONTAINER Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: Beille Ribbed Glass Food Storage Containers with Airtight Silicone Lid, Plastic Free Kitchen Canister for Pantry Organization, Microwave Dishwasher Freezer Safe (3 Sizes) Description: Use them individually or combine all three sizes to create a coordinated pantry organization system, that keeps your kitchen tidy while maintaining a clean, modern aesthetic. Free from plastic and made with non-toxic materials, the Beille Glass Storage Containers provide a healthier and more sustainable way to store food while elevating the look of your kitchen.

Upgrade kitchen storage with the Beille Ribbed Glass Food Storage Containers, an elegant and practical solution for organizing pantry ingredients, leftovers, snacks and meal prep items. Designed with a modern clear ribbed texture and soft silicone lid, these containers combine modern kitchen style with everyday functionality. Whether used individually or as a coordinated set, they provide a reliable plastic free alternative for safe food storage.

Each container is crafted from durable clear glass that allows you to easily see contents at a glance, while adding a subtle decorative touch to your countertop or pantry shelves. The vertical ribbed design gives the container a refined, modern appearance.

The airtight silicone lid helps lock in freshness and protect ingredients from moisture and air exposure. This secure seal makes the containers ideal for storing dry pantry goods such as coffee beans, pasta, grains, sugar, snacks, nuts and baking ingredients, while also working perfectly for leftovers or prepared foods.

Designed for everyday convenience, these glass containers are microwave, dishwasher, and freezer safe, making them versatile enough for food storage, reheating, and long term ingredient preservation. The lightweight design ensures easy handling while still maintaining the durability and strength expected from high-quality glass kitchenware.

Available in three practical sizes, you can choose the container that best fits your storage needs:

18 oz (550 ml) – Perfect for snacks, spices, herbs and small ingredients

37 oz (1100 ml) – Ideal for grains, cereal, leftovers and meal prep

54 oz (1600 ml) – Great for pasta, baking ingredients or bulk pantry storage

Use them individually or combine all three sizes to create a coordinated pantry organization system, that keeps your kitchen tidy while maintaining a clean, modern aesthetic. Free from plastic and made with non-toxic materials, the Beille Glass Storage Containers provide a healthier and more sustainable way to store food while elevating the look of your kitchen. Search Terms: Glass storage container; glass food container; food storage; kitchen essentials; baking supplies; home and kitchen; housewarming gifts new home; wedding gifts; pantry organizers and storage; pantry storage; home decor; home organization; meal prep Features: - PLASTIC FREE NON TOXIC FOOD STORAGE: Upgrade your kitchen with a healthier alternative to plastic containers; Made from durable clear glass with a food safe silicone lid, these glass storage containers provide non toxic food storage for pantry organization, meal prep, leftovers, and everyday kitchen use - AIRTIGHT SILICONE LID FOR FRESHNESS: Each container features a secure, airtight lid that locks in freshness, helping food stay delicious longer; the outer lid is constructed from silicone and features an integrated top clear glass window - MICROWAVE REFRIGERATOR AND DISHWASHER SAFE: Designed for everyday kitchen convenience, these durable glass food containers are safe for microwave reheating (remove lid), dishwasher cleaning and freezer storage; Easily store leftovers, prep meals, or organize pantry items with versatile containers built for modern kitchens - ELEGANT RIBBED GLASS PANTRY CONTAINERS: Elegant glass ribbed texture adds a contemporary touch to any kitchen or pantry, while offering clear visibility of contents for easy organization and identification - THREE CONVENIENT STORAGE SIZES: Ideal for storing spices, snacks, grains, cereal, pasta, coffee, baking supplies and meal prep ingredients; Specification: Large: 9.75 x 4.25 inches (1.18lbs); Medium: 6.5 x 4.25 inches (0.88lbs); Small: 4.0 x 4.25 inches (0.62lbs) === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
